name: Taco Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onion. Drain.
2. Stir in the cream of chicken soup, water, and picante sauce until heated through.
3. Cover the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch baking dish with Doritos.
4. Pour the ground beef mixture over the Doritos.
5. Sprinkle grated cheese on top.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for as long as needed until the cheese melts.
7. Serve topped with lettuce and tomatoes, and add extra cheese, onions, and picante sauce if desired.
